name: ka88-agent-shield
tagline: Professional security audit skill for AI agents with 4-phase protection system
description: Security skill for AI agents that provides comprehensive protection against prompt injection, SSRF attacks, credential exfiltration, malicious JavaScript, and phishing patterns. Features 216 detection patterns, automatic URL checking, content analysis, command safety validation, and periodic self-audit. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, OpenCode and other AI agents.
